THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEDESCHI, GEORGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARDONES, EVA RIVAS, ANA I. PLFT IS ENTITLED TO CASH CHECK #0829 IN THE AMOUNT OF $215.09 FROM MARDONES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
